data.title: Snow Lake Resources Moves GUE Acquisition Forward as Scheme Booklet Reaches Securityholders
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks This Holiday Season

  • Unlock hedge-fund level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Snow Lake Resources ( (LITM) ) has provided an announcement.

On December 23, 2025, Snow Lake Resources Ltd. announced that Global Uranium and Enrichment Limited (GUE) has dispatched its Scheme Booklet to all GUE securityholders, advancing Snow Lake’s proposed acquisition of all GUE shares it does not already own and the replacement of GUE’s unlisted options with new Snow Lake warrants through separate share and option schemes of arrangement under Australian corporations law. The booklet, which includes an independent expert’s report from BDO Corporate Finance Australia concluding that both the share and option schemes are fair and reasonable in the absence of a superior proposal, and a unanimous recommendation from GUE’s independent directors to vote in favor, sets the stage for upcoming securityholder meetings that, if approving the schemes, would consolidate GUE into Snow Lake and expand Snow Lake’s uranium and enrichment portfolio, potentially strengthening its strategic position in the nuclear fuel and critical minerals markets.

More about Snow Lake Resources

Snow Lake Resources Ltd., doing business as Snow Lake Energy, is a Canadian nuclear fuel cycle and critical minerals company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker LITM. The company holds a portfolio of U.S.-focused uranium exploration projects, including the Pine Ridge project in Wyoming and the Engo Valley uranium project in Namibia, alongside additional early-stage critical minerals projects in Manitoba and strategic investments in public companies with rare earth and lithium assets across North America. Snow Lake also has interests in next-generation uranium enrichment and small modular reactor technologies, positioning it within emerging segments of the nuclear energy value chain.

Average Trading Volume: 1,724,183

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $56.83M

On December 22, 2025, Dyne Therapeutics, Inc.’s board of directors elected Vikram Karnani as an independent Class II director, with a term running until the company’s 2028 annual meeting of stockholders, signaling continued attention to board independence and governance. data.title: Nauticus Robotics Regains Nasdaq Compliance Under Monitoring Conditions
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks This Holiday Season

  • Unlock hedge-fund level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Nauticus Robotics ( (KITT) ).

On December 19, 2025, Nauticus Robotics received formal confirmation from Nasdaq that it had regained compliance with the exchange’s equity requirement for continued listing, resolving a deficiency first noted on October 16, 2025, when its market value and alternative listing criteria fell below required thresholds. A Nasdaq Hearings Panel granted the company’s request to remain listed, subject to Nauticus maintaining compliance with all listing rules through April 14, 2026 and sustaining at least $3.5 million in shareholder equity each fiscal quarter through December 19, 2026 under a mandatory monitoring regime, conditions that stabilize its market status but impose tighter financial discipline and continued scrutiny for investors and other stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (KITT) stock is a Hold with a $1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nauticus Robotics stock, see the KITT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on KITT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, KITT is a Neutral.

Nauticus Robotics faces significant financial challenges, with negative profitability and high leverage being the most critical issues. While there are strategic advancements and efforts to strengthen financial positioning, the technical indicators and valuation metrics suggest caution. The company’s ability to address NASDAQ compliance and leverage issues will be crucial for future performance.

To see Spark’s full report on KITT stock, click here.

More about Nauticus Robotics

Nauticus Robotics, Inc., based in Houston and listed on Nasdaq under the ticker KITT, develops autonomous subsea robots and related software for ocean industries. Its technology relies on sensors, artificial intelligence and advanced algorithms to enable robots to adapt to changing underwater environments, with a business model that combines providing robotic services, selling vehicles and components, and licensing software to commercial and defense customers. The company is testing and certifying a new generation of vehicles aimed at reducing operational costs, improving data gathering for subsea infrastructure, and lowering customers’ offshore environmental and safety risks, including retrofit solutions for traditional remotely operated vehicles and third-party platforms.

data.title: Invivyd’s COVID Antibody VYD2311 Receives FDA Fast Track
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium and Invest with Confidence

  • Unlock hedge-fund level data and powerful investing tools designed to help you make smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis so your portfolio is always positioned for maximum potential

The latest announcement is out from Invivyd ( (IVVD) ).

On December 23, 2025, Invivyd announced that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted Fast Track designation to VYD2311, its investigational vaccine-alternative monoclonal antibody designed to prevent COVID in individuals with underlying risk factors for severe disease. The designation could accelerate regulatory review for VYD2311, which is being evaluated in DECLARATION, a pivotal Phase 3 randomized, triple-blind, placebo-controlled trial enrolling about 1,770 adults and adolescents—with and without risk factors—to test single and monthly intramuscular dosing over three months, with top-line data expected in mid-2026; the program underscores Invivyd’s push to secure a stronger position in the COVID prevention market as an antibody-based alternative to vaccines, potentially broadening options for high-risk and general populations if efficacy and safety are confirmed.

The most recent analyst rating on (IVVD) stock is a Buy with a $10.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Invivyd stock, see the IVVD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on IVVD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IVVD is a Neutral.

Invivyd’s overall stock score reflects significant financial and technical weaknesses, marked by ongoing losses and bearish trends. While recent corporate developments offer a glimpse of potential strategic improvement, these are overshadowed by the current financial instability and weak market sentiment.

To see Spark’s full report on IVVD stock, click here.

More about Invivyd

Invivyd, Inc. (Nasdaq: IVVD) is a biopharmaceutical company focused on delivering protection from serious viral infectious diseases, beginning with SARS-CoV-2. Using a proprietary integrated technology platform to assess, monitor and develop antibodies, the company is building a pipeline of monoclonal antibody candidates, including one that received U.S. emergency use authorization in March 2024 for pre-exposure prophylaxis of symptomatic COVID-19 in certain immunocompromised patients.

data.title: Ironwood Pharma Resolves Ferring Dispute, Amends License Terms
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium and Invest with Confidence

  • Unlock hedge-fund level data and powerful investing tools designed to help you make smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis so your portfolio is always positioned for maximum potential

Ironwood Pharma ( (IRWD) ) has issued an update.

On December 18, 2025, Ironwood Pharmaceuticals’ subsidiary VectivBio AG amended its exclusive license agreement with Ferring International Center to revise financial and intellectual property terms, including a total payment obligation of $12.5 million—an initial $7.5 million followed by $5 million due by December 31, 2026, subject to possible acceleration—alongside new tiered royalty commitments on net sales of licensed products. Under the revised structure, VectivBio will pay Ferring a high single-digit royalty for seven years following first commercial sale of each licensed product and a reduced low single-digit royalty thereafter until relevant patent coverage expires, while the amendment also clarifies ownership and other IP rights; on the same date, VectivBio, Ironwood and Ferring entered into a settlement and release resolving all claims related to Ferring’s lawsuit in the U.S. District Court for the Eastern District of Texas, removing a legal overhang and providing clearer economic and IP terms around the licensed portfolio.

The most recent analyst rating on (IRWD) stock is a Hold with a $4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ironwood Pharma stock, see the IRWD Stock Forecast page.

On December 23, 2025, Trident Digital Tech Holdings Ltd held its annual general meeting of shareholders, where investors approved several key corporate actions. Shareholders adopted an amended and restated 2023 Equity Incentive Plan, significantly increasing the pool of shares available for employee and management awards from 137,500,000 to 230,191,250, which may enhance the company’s ability to attract and retain talent but could also introduce additional equity dilution. Spirit Aviation Holdings Inc ( (FLYYQ) ) has shared an update.

Spirit Aviation Holdings Inc. and its subsidiaries, which have been operating under Chapter 11 protection since filing voluntary petitions on August 29, 2025 in the U.S. Bankruptcy Court for the Southern District of New York, filed a monthly operating report on December 22, 2025 covering the period through November 30, 2025, as part of their court-mandated reporting obligations while they continue to run the business as debtors in possession. The company emphasized that the November report is unaudited, limited in scope, not prepared under U.S. securities laws or GAAP, and may be subject to material revisions, cautioning stakeholders that it should not be relied upon to assess current or future financial performance or to make investment decisions, and reserving broad rights to amend the figures and dispute any claims as the restructuring process progresses.

More about Spirit Aviation Holdings Inc

Spirit Aviation Holdings Inc., whose subsidiaries include Spirit Airlines LLC and several Cayman-based financing and IP entities, operates in the aviation and airline industry, with its business and financial reporting historically centered at the Spirit Airlines LLC level. Some of its Cayman subsidiaries have no day-to-day operations or physical presence and maintain limited standalone books and records, reflecting their roles in the group’s financing and intellectual property structure rather than operating activities.

Cencora has seen notable insider selling activity, with three top executives recently cashing out significant holdings. President & CEO Robert Mauch sold 5,096 shares of Cencora stock in a transaction valued at $1,750,221. Executive Vice President Elizabeth S. Campbell disposed of 3,351 shares for a total of $1,146,377. Additionally, Executive Vice President Silvana Battaglia sold 1,677 shares, generating proceeds of $578,565. These sales together highlight substantial profit-taking by Cencora’s leadership team.

Recent Updates on COR stock

In the last 24 hours, Cencora’s stock action has been driven mainly by guidance and analyst commentary rather than any single price shock. The company reaffirmed its fiscal 2026 revenue growth outlook of 5%–7%, signaling confidence in continued operational execution, but noted that its adjusted EPS for the current year is likely to land toward the lower end of its guidance range because it is pausing share repurchases to prioritize the planned acquisition of OneOncology—this trade-off between near-term EPS support and long-term strategic growth is a key factor behind analysts’ reassessments. Barclays initiated coverage with a positive stance on Cencora within a broadly neutral view of the U.S. healthcare technology and distribution space, citing a particularly favorable outlook on drug distributors relative to more mixed sentiment on dental and healthcare IT names, which underpins its constructive positioning on the stock. At the same time, newly disclosed risk-factor commentary emphasized Cencora’s exposure to disruptions from global events such as public health crises, natural disasters, and geopolitical tensions, reminding investors that supply-chain and operational volatility could materially pressure performance despite the company’s strong growth outlook and supportive Wall Street sentiment overall.
